body_txt: We've all heard of the standard superhero power deal , of people with phenomenal cosmic powers note itty bitty living space not mandatory , and of people whose powers make people point and laugh, because What Kind of Lame Power Is Heart, Anyway? Sometimes, though, people like to mix things up and give someone with reasonable, or even cool, powers an additional lame, strange, embarrassing , or useless one. Mostly just because it's funny to list someone's powers as "energy manipulation, one of the greatest healers in the world, super strength and... can talk to slugs", instead of just "energy manipulation, healing, and strength." Of course, Heart Is an Awesome Power can also apply, which means this power can allow for nasty surprises or emergency exits if no one ever takes it into account or it's just too wildly out of line to suspect. Which means the character is "multi-classed" as a Quirky Bard or Lethal Joke Character and standalone versions of these are avoided. A Sub-Trope of Combo Platter Powers . May overlap with Required Secondary Powers and New Powers as the Plot Demands . Compare Arson, Murder, and Jaywalking .
